title: The One Lamp Still Burning
subtitle: Holy Saturday — while all faith flickered, Mary alone kept the flame

stillness: On this day the whole Trinity rested.
Be silent now, and keep watch with her who keeps watch.
gospel: and the stars appeared after the sun had set,
when it was lawful to work,
Mary Magdalene, and Mary of James, and Salome
that coming they might anoint Jesus,
For as Jonah was in the belly of the whale
so shall the Son of Man be in the heart of the earth.
behold: Behold them attentively, and have compassion,
for they are in great affliction.
For what is it to see that the Lady of the world,
and the princes of the churches,
and the leaders of the divine army,
stand so fearful and afflicted,
shut up in a little house,
not knowing what they ought to do?
They sit together, gazing only upon one another,
with tears, as those weighed down by great calamity.
But the Lady stood always with a tranquil and peaceful mind,
for she held the most certain hope of her Son's Resurrection.
Behold now the holy women,
how faithfully and devoutly,
with tears and sighs,
they labour for their Lord
as best they know,
going and returning with mournful faces,
like widows and orphans.
Help them too, if you are permitted, and you can.
consider: In her alone remained the faith of the Church
on this day of the Sabbath.
Therefore, when all the other lights are put out,
one candle in the office of darkness is kept burning,
because the light of faith remained in the Virgin Mary alone.
Augustine says: She grieved that He whom the Virgin bore died unjustly,
yet hoping and firmly believing that He would rise again,
according to the promise, on the third day, death conquered.
In her alone, in those three days, stood the faith of the Church.
And while each one wavered and hesitated,
she, who had conceived Him by faith,
never lost the faith she once received from God,
and with most certain hope awaited the glory of the Resurrection.
Yet she could not stand rejoicing,
for the memory of her Son's death, suffered unjustly.
The Father had rested from the work of creation, the work of great power;
the Son rested from the work of re-creation, the work of infinite wisdom;
the Holy Spirit rested this day in the Virgin,
the work of great and infinite goodness,
for she stood firm while the rest fell from the grace of the Holy Spirit.
prayer: the ineffable mercy of Your tenderness was not yet satisfied,
until, breaking through the bars of hell also,
That blessed and most holy soul of Yours descended to the dead,
leading the bound out of darkness and the shadow of death.
through this ineffable tenderness of Yours,
upon the souls of Your servants,
that You may snatch them from the pains they deserve for their sins,
and lead them to joys eternal. Amen.

latinJewel.latin: Et ideo, aliis luminaribus exstinctis, una candela in officio tenebrarum servatur accensa, quia lumen fidei in sola remansit virgine Maria.
latinJewel.english: And therefore, when the other lights are extinguished, one candle is kept burning in the office of Tenebrae, because the light of faith remained in the Virgin Mary alone.
